expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 acknowledges 'you haven't logged into [Product] in about two months' and Email 2 lists new features as reasons to return.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 states 'If [Product] isn't a fit right now, no hard feelings. You can [cancel/pause/keep your account — whatever applies]' alongside a login CTA.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: After the sequence section states 'No engagement: Remove from marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
Emails acknowledge the customer may be busy ('I get it — life gets busy'), invite feedback, and Email 4 closes with 'This is the last email we'll send about coming back.'
